headline: 1 Low-Risk, High-Reward Way to ‘Just Do It’ and Trade Nike Stock with Options
summary: When there’s an iconic brand, a blue-chip stock, down more than 70% from its peak price, and I can still own it with a downside risk level I define myself? “Just Do It” sings in my ears.

headline: Can Nike Limp Across the Finish Line to Dividend Aristocrat Status?
summary: Nike (NYSE: NKE) just delivered its latest quarterly dividend of $0.41 per share, paid on April 1, 2026, marking 24 consecutive years of dividend increases. That streak places Nike within striking distance of Dividend Aristocrat status, which requires 25 years of uninterrupted growth. However, the financial backdrop surrounding this payment raises questions that income investors ... Can Nike Limp Across the Finish Line to Dividend Aristocrat Status?
